title: New Rebuild Video Angel of Doom
display_title: New Rebuild Video Angel of Doom
wikitext:
[]: New Rebuild Video: Angel of Doom             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 25, 2007 12:42 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wowHngrWJOw Nice desu!

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Tue Sep 25, 2007 12:57 pm Yes, this trailer is pretty fantastic! The music is awesome too - completely sold me on buying the OST! SOMEONE PLEASE INTERNET THIS NOW!!

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:10 pm I know this is a dumbass question but, what exactly does that Japanese read at the beginning?

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:16 pm These trailers all spoil a LOT of the movie. It doesn't make sense that they'd make these if the new series was truly aimed towards people who've never seen Eva as they say. It makes me wonder. Edit: I wonder how many people in Japan have never seen Eva. :P

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:42 pm That video makes me wanna...makes me wanna... SING THE DOOM SONG! http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t6vtFRsBieA

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:51 pm Is that the same video I posted in the trailer thread? BTW, it's hard to see, but in the last cut where demonic Sho is walking out of the explosion, it's raining blood.

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilator » Tue Sep 25, 2007 2:06 pm Ornette wrote: Is that the same video I posted in the trailer thread? BTW, it's hard to see, but in the last cut where demonic Sho is walking out of the explosion, it's raining blood.

[]:             Quote Post by Morei » Tue Sep 25, 2007 2:43 pm All I have to say is... DDOOO WWWAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANNNNNNNNTT!!!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Sep 25, 2007 3:31 pm Ok, i just had a tiny orgasm! :P Thanks for the new video, great bg music btw.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Sep 25, 2007 3:45 pm Well, that was nice.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 25, 2007 6:17 pm I guess that SDAT or iPod question is answered. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 25, 2007 6:46 pm I saw that too. Still an SDAT. Well, we've passed the year 2000 without any apocalypses as well, so...why not?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 25, 2007 7:30 pm He should have had a MD (MiniDisc) instead. :)

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 25, 2007 7:44 pm Maybe, maybe. But there's no guarantee an MD would work in LCL while waiting for a colossal angel to drop out of orbit?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Sep 25, 2007 8:12 pm What's up with the sea already being red? I think Its awesome Lilith's In the first Movie THe score for that video wwas amazing I hope they put more epic sounding stuff as 2.0 3.0 and FINAL come out

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 25, 2007 8:14 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Maybe, maybe. But there's no guarantee an MD would work in LCL while waiting for a colossal angel to drop out of orbit?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 25, 2007 8:19 pm You missed the hint. Actually, I forgot to tell that it wasn't Shinji, it was Asuka. She listens to music on her SDAT while waiting for Sahaquiel to go Kamikaze.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji1414 » Tue Sep 25, 2007 9:05 pm if Shinji will have an IPOD all will be different :) . NWhen is going to change that SDAT :?

[]:             Quote Post by Bluespade » Wed Sep 26, 2007 1:45 am Loved the music for that trailer. Sigh, makes me want to see it even more... unfortunetly, despite the beatiful art, it all pretty much looks like a straight up remake, nothing new really... so it's the next one I REALLY want to see.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Sep 26, 2007 3:18 am Da da den dun da di da daaaaa....da da den dun da di da daaaaa..... Shiro Sagisu, you really know how to make epic music! Listening to it over and over again, what's being said in the vocals? I thought I heard the word "Dameda"...if Nigecha Dameda is any indication, "Run Away?" I also heard "Angel of Doom is coming".
